providers.name: The Vocal Coach (vocalcoach.org.uk)
providers.notes: Award-winning coach covering Reading, Maidenhead, Henley, Wokingham and London — explicitly teaches Pop, Rock and Hard Rock alongside classical and MT (strong Ozzy-legacy fit).

providers.name: Blue Mic Music — Sasha Steventon
providers.notes: Professional piano tutor and vocal coach covering a 10-mile radius of Marlow/Henley — 150+ student base, creative contemporary focus.

providers.name: The Unicorn Vocal Academy — Lucy Morris
providers.notes: Berkshire-based academy covering Windsor, Maidenhead and Slough — teaches adults and children across pop and musical theatre with performance/exam opportunities.

providers.name: Jackie Palmer Stage School — Voice Academy
providers.notes: Established Bucks stage school (since 1971) with dedicated Voice Academy — strong MT pipeline for youth; same school has alumni in West End and TV.

providers.name: Helen Sanderson White
providers.notes: Teaching singing in Aylesbury since 1995 — specialises in popular styles including rock, soul and jazz; useful local option for rock-leaning students.

providers.name: Watford Singing — Lucy Phillips
providers.notes: 22+ years as a professional voice coach in contemporary styles with 32 years in music/performance — strongest Watford-area contemporary option.

providers.name: OG Vocal Studio — Oli Goodall
providers.notes: Watford-based singer/educator offering tailored vocal coaching around voice, style and aesthetic — in-person + Zoom for all ages/styles.

providers.name: Soho Vocal Tuition — Ed Staunton
providers.notes: BIG FLAG for Ozzy legacy: 30+ yrs starting in rock/indie/pop, highest-level SLS instructor in UK, clients include Grammy winners, BRIT/Mercury nominees, X-Factor finalists and leads in 'We Will Rock You'.

providers.name: Danny Rodeck — London Vocal Coach
providers.notes: Rare triple-certified coach — masters Complete Vocal Technique (CVT), Estill (EVT) and Speech Level Singing (SLS). Huge technique-safety value for rock voices.

providers.name: Rachel Lynes — The Sing Space
providers.notes: Leading West End vocal coach — has coached stars of major West End shows (Emma Hatton, Cassidy Janson, Gina Beck). Top-tier MT option.

providers.name: Jamie Anderson Vocal Coaching
providers.notes: Director of Singing at CTA West London, also teaches at London Studio Centre and Urdang Academy — pro-level MT and conservatoire-style training.

providers.name: Antony Tyler Private Music
providers.notes: Degree-qualified DBS-cleared coach who has fronted rock/pop, jazz/swing and soul bands — practical band-leader perspective for rock vocalists.

providers.name: Jamie Read Vocal Coaching
providers.notes: Ex-West End professional performer with 20+ years' experience — covers MT, rock and pop; edge-of-radius but worth the drive for pro-level coaching.

providers.name: Willow Ley — Singing Lessons Uxbridge
providers.notes: Closest multi-genre teacher to Chalfont St Giles — explicitly teaches rock plus classical, jazz and theatre; lessons at home, West London music school, or student's home.

providers.name: Uxbridge Piano School — Vocal Department
providers.notes: Closest established music school with dedicated vocal coaching — qualified teachers, all levels from beginner to aspiring performer.
